title: GNAX-033 The days when a neat and innocent young wife was forcibly committed by the homeless
description: One day when Sakio, a neat married woman who is living a happy married life, is going on an overseas business trip, Saki who is addicted to Saki is forced to have a relationship with Saki who is trembling with fear that two homeless people suddenly break in. I resist as much as I can, but my reason gradually collapses due to daily adultery in the smell of body odor and body fluids that are miserably violated without being able to overcome the desires of men.
